items.headline: Gator Guard expands roster-wide tier program
items.detail: Gator Guard announced expanded tiered deals for skill-position starters ahead of the 2026 season.

items.headline: Reported seven-figure portal package secured OL commitment
items.detail: Multiple outlets reported a coordinated package helped land a priority portal OL target.

items.headline: SEC-leading pool cited in five-star recruitment
items.detail: Analysts linked Texas A&M's NIL standing to momentum on a top-10 national recruit.

items.headline: Georgia staff emphasizes NIL as roster retention tool
items.detail: Staff comments in spring media emphasized collective support for returning starters.

items.headline: In-state flip tied to Gator Guard visibility at OV
items.detail: Family cited structured NIL education and collective roadmap during official visit weekend.
